vocab.meaning: giữa thiên nhiên (trong lòng thiên nhiên)
vocab.example: Growing up in a rural area, I spent most of my afternoons in nature's lap, wandering through the vast paddy fields.

vocab.meaning: luồng gió mới/sự sảng khoái (nghĩa đen là hít thở không khí trong lành)
vocab.example: Going for a stroll after a long day of school was like a breath of fresh air for my restless young mind.

vocab.meaning: mải mê/đắm chìm vào điều gì đó
vocab.example: I used to lose myself in the beauty of the local park, often forgetting the time until the sun began to set.

vocab.meaning: người được yêu mến nhất (thường dùng để kể về việc đi dạo cùng ông bà/cha mẹ)
vocab.example: As the apple of my grandfather's eye, I was always his companion on his daily constitutional around the lake.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu rời đi/bắt đầu hành động
vocab.example: Whenever the rain stopped, my friends and I would immediately make a move to the nearby hills for a hike.

vocab.meaning: rất chậm chạp (thong thả đi bộ)
vocab.example: We used to walk at a snail's pace, stopping every few minutes to inspect a curious insect or a colorful stone.

vocab.meaning: để mắt tới/tìm kiếm điều gì đó
vocab.example: On our woodland walks, we would always keep an eye out for wild berries or hidden bird nests.
Even as a child, I realized that a quick walk outside was the best way to recharge my batteries after a nap.

vocab.meaning: thế giới thiên nhiên bên ngoài
vocab.example: My parents strongly encouraged us to embrace the great outdoors instead of staying cooped up inside with toys.
Time flies when you are exploring the neighborhood with your best friends; those walks felt far too short.
